block.header: aki tu mi kamwi to opo ya sima kuni sira si myesu sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu opo mikoto wo ugonapar eru mi kwo tati opo kimi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,4@皇子等王等百官人等天下公民諸聞食止詔,*

sentence.transcription: aki tu mi kamwi to
opo ya sima kuni sira si myesu
sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu
opo mikoto wo ugonapar eru

sentence.kanji: 皇子等王等百官人等天下公民諸聞食止詔
sentence.transcription: mi kwo tati opo kimi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: takama no para ni koto pazimete topo sumyerogi no mi yo naka ima ni itaru made ni sumyera ga mi kwo no are masa mu iya tugi tugi ni opo ya sima kuni sirasa mu tugite to ama tu kamwi no mi kwo nagara mo ame ni masu kamwi no yosa si maturi si manima ni ko no ama tu pi tugitaka mi kura no waza to aki tu mi kamwi to opo ya sima kuni sirosimyesu yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto no saduke tama pi opose tama pu taputwo ki taka ki piro ki atu ki opo mikoto wo uke tamapa ri kasikwomi masi te ko no wosu kuni ame no sita wo totonope tama pi tapirage tama pi ame no sita no opo mi takara wo utukusibwi tama pi nade tamapa mu to namo kamu nagara omoposi mye saku to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,1@遠天皇祖御世中今至麻弖尓,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,NP,8@随此天津日嗣高御座之業止,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,PP-OB1-GEN,NP,11@倭根子天皇命授賜比負賜布貴支高支広支厚支,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,13@此乃食国天下乎調賜比平賜比,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,17@天皇大命乎諸聞食止詔,*

sentence.transcription: takama no para ni koto pazimete

sentence.kanji: 遠天皇祖御世中今至麻弖尓
sentence.transcription: topo sumyerogi no mi yo naka ima ni itaru made ni
sumyera ga mi kwo no are masa mu
iya tugi tugi ni
opo ya sima kuni sirasa mu
tugite to

sentence.kanji: 天都神乃御子随母天坐
sentence.transcription: ama tu kamwi no mi kwo nagara mo ame ni masu
kamwi no yosa si maturi si

sentence.kanji: 随此天津日嗣高御座之業止
sentence.transcription: manima ni ko no ama tu pi tugitaka mi kura no waza to
aki tu mi kamwi to
opo ya sima kuni sirosimyesu

sentence.kanji: 倭根子天皇命授賜比負賜布貴支高支広支厚支
sentence.transcription: yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto no saduke tama pi opose tama pu taputwo ki taka ki piro ki atu ki
opo mikoto wo uke tamapa ri kasikwomi masi te

sentence.kanji: 此乃食国天下乎調賜比平賜比
sentence.transcription: ko no wosu kuni ame no sita wo totonope tama pi tapirage tama pi
ame no sita no opo mi takara wo utukusibwi tama pi
nade tamapa mu to namo
kamu nagara omoposi mye saku to noritamapu

sentence.kanji: 天皇大命乎諸聞食止詔
sentence.transcription: sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: koko wo motite sumyera ga mikadwo no siki tamapi okonapi tama p yeru tukasa dukasa no pito domo yo mo no wosu kuni wo wosame mature to make tama p yeru kuni guni no mikoto moti domo ni itaru made ni kuni no nori wo ayamati wokasu koto na ku aka ki kiyo ki napo ki makoto no kokoro wo motite mi pakari pakarite yurupi okotaru koto na ku tutwome simarite tukape mature to noritamapu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,1@天皇朝廷敷賜行賜幣留,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,2@百官人等四方食国乎治奉止任賜幣留,*

sentence.transcription: koko wo motite

sentence.kanji: 天皇朝廷敷賜行賜幣留
sentence.transcription: sumyera ga mikadwo no siki tamapi okonapi tama p yeru

sentence.kanji: 百官人等四方食国乎治奉止任賜幣留
sentence.transcription: tukasa dukasa no pito domo yo mo no wosu kuni wo wosame mature to make tama p yeru
kuni guni no mikoto moti domo ni itaru made ni
kuni no nori wo ayamati wokasu
koto na ku
aka ki kiyo ki napo ki
makoto no kokoro wo motite
mi pakari pakarite yurupi okotaru
koto na ku tutwome simarite
tukape mature to noritamapu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: kare kaku no sama wo kiki tamape satorite iswosi ku tukape matura mu pito pa so no tukape matu r era mu sama no manima ni sina zina pome tamapi age tamapi wosame tamapa mu mono zo to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP,NP,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,0@故如此之状乎聞食悟而欸将仕奉,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,4@天皇大命乎諸聞食止詔,*

sentence.kanji: 故如此之状乎聞食悟而欸将仕奉
sentence.transcription: kare kaku no sama wo kiki tamape satorite iswosi ku tukape matura mu
pito pa so no tukape matu r era mu

sentence.kanji: 状随品々讃賜上賜治将賜
sentence.transcription: sama no manima ni sina zina pome tamapi age tamapi wosame tamapa mu
mono zo to noritamapu

sentence.kanji: 天皇大命乎諸聞食止詔
sentence.transcription: sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu
